metadata.title: WhatsApp Username Link Generator + QR Code (Free) | WhatsUser.link
metadata.description: Create a shareable link and QR code for your WhatsApp Username in seconds. Simple, fast, and free.

items.question: How do I create a WhatsApp link from my username?
items.answer: Open WhatsApp, go to Settings → Profile, tap your name to set a Username, then enter that same username above and WhatsUser.link generates a shareable link, a short link, and a downloadable QR code for it — no signup needed.

items.question: What is WhatsUser.link?
items.answer: It's a free tool to create a shareable link and QR code for your WhatsApp Username, so people can reach you without saving your number.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: Yes. Generating your link and QR code is completely free and doesn't require signing up.

items.question: Does wa.me/username work yet?
items.answer: Not yet. WhatsApp hasn't published an official link format for usernames, so we also offer a phone-number generator that works today.

items.question: What is the Username Key?
items.answer: It's an optional code WhatsApp lets you attach to your username, useful when several people may have similar usernames. If you've set one, you can share it together with your link.

items.question: Is WhatsUser.link affiliated with WhatsApp or Meta?
items.answer: No. We're an independent tool, not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with WhatsApp Inc. or Meta.

items.question: What is wa.me?
items.answer: wa.me is WhatsApp's official short domain for links that open a chat, such as wa.me/1234567890 for a phone number. WhatsUser.link builds these links for you automatically.

items.question: How do I create a WhatsApp link without saving the contact first?
items.answer: Generate a link with your phone number or username here, then share it. Anyone who opens the link can message you on WhatsApp without adding your number to their contacts first.

items.question: Is my phone number or username stored anywhere?
items.answer: No. WhatsUser.link is stateless — your link and QR code are built entirely in your browser and nothing is saved on our servers.

items.question: Can I use this for a WhatsApp Business account?
items.answer: Yes. The generator works the same way for personal and WhatsApp Business numbers and usernames.

items.question: How do I create a WhatsApp QR code?
items.answer: Enter your username or phone number in the generator above, then use the QR code panel to customize the color and download it as PNG, JPEG, SVG, or PDF.

guide.title: How to Create a WhatsApp Link From Your Username
guide.metaDescription: Step-by-step guide to creating a shareable WhatsApp link from your Username, including what to do until wa.me/username officially works.
guide.intro: WhatsApp is rolling out @Username handles, letting people message you without knowing your phone number. Here's how to turn yours into a link and QR code you can share anywhere.

steps.title: Set your WhatsApp Username
steps.description: In the WhatsApp app, go to Settings → Profile and set your Username (requires an app version that supports the 2026 rollout).

steps.title: Add a Username Key (optional)
steps.description: If WhatsApp assigns you a Username Key to disambiguate you from others with the same username, note it down.

steps.title: Generate your link
steps.description: Paste your Username (and Key, if you have one) into the generator on this site.

steps.title: Copy your link or download your QR code
steps.description: Use "Copy all" to share your username and key together, or download the QR code as PNG, JPEG, SVG, or PDF.

steps.title: Share it anywhere
steps.description: Add it to your bio, business card, email signature, or storefront.

guide.noteHeading: Important: wa.me/username doesn't open a chat automatically yet
guide.note: As of now, WhatsApp hasn't published a working deep-link format for usernames — wa.me/<username> does not open a chat. Whoever receives your link or QR code needs to open WhatsApp and search for your username manually. If you need a link that works today, use the phone-number generator on the home page instead.
guide.ctaText: Generate your WhatsApp Username link now.
guide.linkLabel: How to create a WhatsApp link

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: How WhatsUser.link handles data: what we don't collect, what our hosting and ad provider process, and your rights.
privacy.intro: WhatsUser.link ("we", "us") operates whatsusernames.link. This page explains what little data is involved when you use this free tool, and why.

sections.heading: This tool is stateless
body: WhatsUser.link builds your WhatsApp link and QR code entirely in your browser. The WhatsApp Username, Username Key, phone number, and message you enter are never sent to or stored on our servers. Closing or refreshing the page erases them.

sections.heading: No accounts, no sign-up
body: There is no registration, login, or user account. We have no database of users or usernames.

sections.heading: Server logs
body: Like any website, our hosting provider (Vercel) processes standard technical logs to serve pages — IP address, browser type, and request timestamps. These are used only for security, abuse prevention, and reliability, and we don't link them to any personal profile.

sections.heading: Cookies and local storage
body: We don't set tracking cookies ourselves. Your light/dark theme preference is saved only in your browser's local storage and never leaves your device.

sections.heading: Advertising
body: This site shows ads served by Adsterra, a third-party advertising network. Adsterra's ad content may use cookies or similar technologies in your browser to serve and measure ads. We don't control this data. If you prefer not to see ads or be measured by them, review Adsterra's own privacy practices or use an ad blocker / your browser's tracking protection.

sections.heading: Analytics
body: We don't currently run any first-party analytics or tracking script. If this changes, this policy will be updated first.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Because we don't collect or store personal data on our servers, there is generally nothing for us to access, correct, or delete. If you believe we hold data about you, contact us using the details below and we'll look into it.

sections.heading: Children's privacy
body: This tool isn't directed at children, and we don't knowingly collect information from children.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: We may update this page as the tool evolves. The date above reflects the latest revision.

sections.heading: Contact
body: Questions about this policy? Email contact@whatsusernames.link.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms for using WhatsUser.link's free WhatsApp link and QR code generator.
terms.intro: By using whatsusernames.link ("the Service"), you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the Service.

sections.heading: What this Service does
body: WhatsUser.link is a free tool that generates a shareable WhatsApp link and QR code from a WhatsApp Username, Username Key, or phone number you provide, entirely in your browser.

sections.heading: No account, free to use
body: The Service is 100% free, with no signup and no payment required for its current features.

sections.heading: Accuracy is your responsibility
body: You're responsible for entering your own correct username, phone number, and message. We don't verify identity or ownership of any username or phone number entered into the generator.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
body: Don't use the Service to generate links for numbers or usernames you don't have the right to share, or for spam, harassment, fraud, or impersonation.

sections.heading: wa.me/username limitation
body: As of the date of these terms, wa.me/username links don't reliably open a WhatsApp chat, because WhatsApp hasn't published an official format for them. We make no guarantee that this or any generated link will behave as expected, and we provide a phone-number generator as a currently working alternative.

sections.heading: No warranty
body: The Service is provided "as is," without warranty of any kind, including uptime, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
body: To the extent permitted by law, we aren't liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Service.

sections.heading: Third-party links and ads
body: The Service links to and displays content from third parties we don't control and aren't responsible for, including advertising served by Adsterra and WhatsApp itself.

sections.heading: No affiliation
body: WhatsUser.link is an independent tool, not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with WhatsApp Inc. or Meta Platforms, Inc.

sections.heading: Changes
body: We may update these terms as the Service evolves. Continued use after changes means you accept the current version.

sections.heading: Governing law
body: These terms are governed by the laws of Portugal, without prejudice to any mandatory consumer-protection law of your country of residence.

sections.heading: Contact
body: Questions about these terms? Email contact@whatsusernames.link.
